subject: style(map): remove glow shadow from search center dot
body:
The info theme color already differentiates it from primary station
markers — the box-shadow glow was inconsistent (no other marker has it)
and rendered unreliably across platforms.

Tags: map, ui, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: map
